insight_source_id.title: Source ID
insight_source_id.description: Stable identifier for this GitHub instance (e.g., 'github-acme-prod').

github_token.title: Access Token
github_token.description: GitHub Personal Access Token or GitHub App installation token. Required scopes: repo, read:org, read:user.

github_organizations.title: Organizations
github_organizations.description: List of GitHub organization logins to collect.

github_start_date.title: Start Date
github_start_date.description: Start date for initial collection (YYYY-MM-DD). Commits and PRs before this date are skipped on the first run.

github_pr_page_size.title: PR Page Size
github_pr_page_size.description: Number of pull requests per GraphQL page. Lower values reduce risk of GitHub 504 timeouts. Range: 10-100.

github_embedded_commits_per_pr.title: Embedded Commits per PR
github_embedded_commits_per_pr.description: Max commits embedded per PR in the bulk query. Overflow is fetched separately.

github_embedded_reviews_per_pr.title: Embedded Reviews per PR
github_embedded_reviews_per_pr.description: Max reviews embedded per PR in the bulk query. Overflow is fetched separately.

github_embedded_comments_per_pr.title: Embedded Comments per PR
github_embedded_comments_per_pr.description: Max comments embedded per PR in the bulk query. Overflow is fetched separately.

github_embedded_review_threads_per_pr.title: Embedded Review Threads per PR
github_embedded_review_threads_per_pr.description: Max review threads embedded per PR in the bulk query. Overflow is fetched separately.

github_embedded_thread_comments.title: Embedded Comments per Review Thread
github_embedded_thread_comments.description: Max comments per review thread embedded in the bulk query. Overflow is fetched separately.
